title: 葵との絆・よき指導者たれ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin invites me out for a slightly late
New Year's shrine visit.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming,
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for inviting you out so suddenly, but...
there's something that I need to share with you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's always a Kiryuin family gathering for
New Year's. It's mainly a chance for us to
exchange the latest information, but...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
This year, my great-aunt complimented me for
the first time.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: She said I've become a good mentor.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
My great-aunt has an important role in the URA,
and she was once a skilled trainer who brought
honor to the Kiryuin family.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's why... no matter how much the people
around me say what a good job I'm doing, my
family always tells me I still have a lot to learn.
choice_data_list: And now they've recognized your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I was able to show them that I'm worthy of
the family name, even if only a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...And that's because of you,
Trainer <username>.
So today, I'd like to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Your perspective has shown me parts of
myself I couldn't see. With you by my side, I've
been able to continue improving.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful to have you as my peer! Let's
continue to push each other to be the best
trainers that we can be!
choice_data_list: Thank you! I feel the same!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It seems we've managed to get each other
properly motivated for the new year!

text_block_list.name: Male Barker
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! You seem like you've got a lot of
spirit! Why don't you try putting your strength to
the test?

text_block_list.name: Male Barker
text_block_list.text:
By participating in the New Year's Tile Smashing
Extravaganza!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That sounds like another great source of
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Thinking back, I used to have a real
fondness for karate!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sounds of smashing tiles and Kiryuin's
vigorous shouts echo through the January sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that my friendship with Trainer
Kiryuin will continue to grow from here.
